title: Altinity SQL Browser Dashboard grafana-grid@1 layout
description: The normative grafana-grid@1 Dashboard layout: rowless deterministic packing driven by dashboard.tiles order into a single 12-column grid, and per-tile span/height placements keyed by tile ID. Unlike flow@1 this engine has no preset. A grafana-grid primary layout always pairs with a valid flow@1 DashboardLayoutFallbackV1 document, regenerated on every mutation.

type.title: Layout engine
type.description: Layout engine identifier; always grafana-grid for this contract.

version.title: Layout engine version
version.description: grafana-grid contract version; always 1 for this contract.

items.title: Tile placements
items.description: Per-tile placement keyed by tile ID. A missing placement uses span 6 and medium height.

grafanaGridHeightV1.title: Tile height
grafanaGridHeightV1.description: Normative height ordering is compact < medium < large; exact pixels are renderer-defined. Shared vocabulary with flow@1.

grafanaGridTilePlacementV1.title: Tile placement
grafanaGridTilePlacementV1.description: Closed placement contract: unknown fields fail validation. Future extension requires grafana-grid@2 or an explicit extension namespace.

span.title: Column span
span.description: Columns (of 12) the tile occupies; the effective span is clamped to the active column count at each responsive breakpoint.
